zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Cardinam and Bodardle於1200年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾卡迪納姆時，他的父親Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton28歲，母親Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam25歲。他與Eleanor de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1252年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾博德明享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Cardinam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Adelard, Alberic, Clovis, Colette, Fabienne, Fernand, Francois, Germaine, Gilles.

French and English: from Old French, Middle English cardinal ‘cardinal’, the church dignitary (Latin cardinalis, originally an adjective meaning ‘crucial’). The surname was probably bestowed as a nickname on someone who habitually dressed in red, or who had played the part of a cardinal in a pageant, or who acted in a lordly and patronizing manner.
English: possibly also an altered form of Carbonell . Reaney notes that Cardinal's Farm in Foxearth (Essex) is recorded as Carbonels in 1381 and Cardynals in 1577.

variants.name: Carbonell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Eduardo, Rafael, Roberto, Carlos, Manuel, Miguel, Pablo, Rolando.
Catalan: from an old personal name, Carbonellus in Latin, derived from Latin carbo ‘coal, charcoal’. This surname is also found in southern France (mainly Pyrénées-Orientales).

English (of Norman or Huguenot origin): nickname for a man with dark hair or a swarthy complexion, from a diminutive of Anglo-Norman French carbon ‘charcoal’. The name was also reintroduced to Britain by Huguenot refugees in the 17th century.

variants.name: Cardinale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Mario, Rocco, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Cosimo, Salvador, Carlo, Cosmo, Francesca, Gasper, Gennaro, Angelina, Demetrio, Gaspar, Gerardo, Julio, Lucrecia, Romero, Rosario.
Italian: from cardinale ‘cardinal’ (see Cardinal ), a nickname for a haughty individual, or a metonymic occupational name for the servant of a cardinal.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Cardinam and Bodardle was born in 1200, in Cardinham, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton, was 28 and his mother, Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, was 25. He married Eleanor de Ferrers. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1252, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

Il a épousé Eleanor de Ferrers. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1252, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Cardinam and Bodardle(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 카딘함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Eleanor de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보드민에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Cardinam and Bodardle родился в 1200 г. в местности кардинам, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, 25.
